textPlain: Nice gimmick that many elements inside that explainer image directly links you to the respective source code, its referring to.

Great piece of software. For me its killer feature is automatically passing through exposed ports in a container, so you don't have to recreate the container with different -p options. (See https://evertheylen.eu/p/probox-intro/#network)

For some context, Passt is used by podman for rootless networking (by default from Podman 5.0)It is a noticable improvement for traffic heavy containers.https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/tutorial...
